name: Крупный портрет (бюст) — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm pale-green eyes
framing: Extreme close-up bust portrait — her head and shoulders fill most of the frame, framed roughly from the collarbone up, face large and central, gaze near life-size and intimate. Keep a clear, even chroma margin on all sides so the top of her hair, her ear tips, and both shoulders never touch or bleed off the frame edge. No border, no full-body figure, no slogan plate — just the face and shoulders close.
render: Detailed anime cel-shading with soft gradient skin, intimate close portrait, expressive half-lidded eyes with a delicate catchlight; crisp clean line-art on the hair strands and ear tips, gentle rim light along the silver hair.
moment: Frieren fills the frame in an extreme close-up bust: her calm, faintly melancholic face turned a few degrees off-camera, half-lidded pale-green eyes gazing softly into the middle distance as if remembering something long past, lips relaxed and unsmiling with the barest wistful softness. Loose strands of very long silver-white hair fall across her cheeks and forehead, framing the face; her two side twin-tails hang over her shoulders in soft flowing locks that stay within the crop. Both long pointed elf ears are clearly visible through the hair, one just brushed by a stray strand. At the lower edge of the crop the mage attire reads plainly on her shoulders: the high stiff collar of the dark charcoal-black hooded cape rising at her neck, and beneath it the cream-white mage robe with its warm gold trim catching a soft highlight. Because this is a tight head-and-shoulders crop there is no room for a staff or grimoire, and none is shown. A soft directional light models the cheekbone and nose; a faint rim light traces the crown of her hair. The background is an empty, even chroma field with no border, no full-length figure, and no text plate. ANATOMY: correct facial anatomy — two eyes, two long pointed elf ears, a natural symmetrical face; hands, arms, staff and grimoire fall outside this tight collarbone-up crop and are not shown; no extra or duplicated features, no second head, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject stays well away from every edge of the frame, surrounded on all sides by a clean, even chroma field for easy cut-out.
art_style: Интимный сверхкрупный бюст-портрет: лицо и плечи Фрирен занимают почти весь кадр, живой близкий полуприкрытый взгляд, детальный аниме-целл-шейдинг с мягким светом. Никакой рамки, слогана и фигуры в полный рост — только эмоция крупным планом.
typography: No lettering on this print — leave it clean. The composition is carried entirely by the intimate close-up face; adding type would fight the bust crop. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: silver-white hair #E8EAF0, ivory-cream robe #F3ECD8, warm gold trim #C9A24B, charcoal-black cape #23252B, muted pale sage-green eyes #A9C7A0, soft rose blush skin #E7B7A8
chroma_note: В кадре нет синих элементов: волосы серебристо-белые, мантия кремовая, накидка угольно-чёрная, оторочка золотая, кожа розоватая, глаза приглушённо-зелёные. Крупные глаза Фрирен — фокус бюст-портрета, и они зелёные, поэтому зелёный хромакей рисковал бы частично выесть радужки (дыры в глазах). Синий полностью отсутствует в её палитре, поэтому ключевой синий даёт чистейший кей без конфликта с субъектом. Фон и вся графика вырезаются по синему хромакею. Поэтому chroma = blue.

name: Динамика / магия — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm half-lidded pale green eyes, caught mid-spell with one hand raised into a swirling coil of mana
framing: Dynamic three-quarter action crop from a low dramatic angle, framing Frieren from mid-thigh up as she is caught in the instant of casting; her torso twists on a strong diagonal so the silver twin-tails, the high-collared dark cloak and the sleeve of the white mantle sweep across the composition, while the raised casting hand and the pale spell-glow are pushed into the upper third. The wooden staff cuts a diagonal counter-line through the lower corner. Every element — hair tips, cloak hem, staff, and all magic effects — is deliberately pulled inward so nothing touches the frame edge, leaving a clean, even chroma-key margin on all four sides for cutout.
render: Bold anime cel-shading with crisp dark ink outlines and hard shadow steps, layered over glowing additive magic light: a pale gold and soft cyan spell-bloom, thin sparks and light-trails, plus a streaking motion sweep blurred into the hair and cloak so the frame reads as kinetic action rather than a still pose.
moment: Frieren is frozen at the peak of a spell. Seen from a low, slightly upward angle, her body is turned three-quarters and coiled on a diagonal — one shoulder dropped, the other lifted — as her right hand snaps upward and a spiral of mana unwinds from her open palm. The mana reads as a luminous pale-gold and cyan-white coil, ribboning up and outward with thin sparks flung off its edge, its light catching the gold trim of her cream mantle and glinting on the crystal orb of the wooden staff she braces in her other hand across the lower diagonal. Her enormous silver-white twin-tails are lifted and streaming sideways in the spell's updraft, and the charcoal-black high-collared cloak billows behind her in a hard sweep, its inner lining flashing as it turns. Motion-blur trails smear off the hair tips and cloak hem to sell the speed. Her long pointed elven ears are clearly visible through the flying hair; her face stays composed and quietly intent — half-lidded pale green eyes, no dramatic grimace — the calm center of all the surrounding energy. She sits off-center toward the lower-left third, the mana spiral filling the upper-right, so the whole print leans into the diagonal with empty space breathing around the burst. There is NO decorative border, NO frame, NO ground line and NO caption plate — only the figure and her magic against nothing. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and all graphics are held well away from the frame edge, with clean, even, flat chroma-key field all around for cutout.
art_style: Динамичная экшн-иллюстрация в аниме-целл: не статичный портрет, а пойманный миг заклинания. Диагональная композиция снизу, развевающиеся волосы и накидка, вихрь маны и свечение дают кадру движение и энергию.
typography: No lettering on this print — leave it clean. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: silver-white hair, ivory-cream mantle, warm gold trim, charcoal-black cloak, pale gold spell-light, soft cyan mana glow
chroma_note: В кадре нет крупных зелёных полей: свечение маны сделано тёплым золото-циановым, а не зелёным, фон — чистая ровная подложка. Светло-зелёные глаза Фрирен — крошечная деталь и не мешают кеингу, поэтому зелёный хромакей безопасен.

name: Минимал line-art — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, in the high-collared dark mantle of a mage
framing: A single small-to-medium continuous-line bust drawing of Frieren placed high and slightly left of center, occupying only about a third of the frame; large empty negative space fills the rest on every side. The drawing and any mark stay well clear of all edges, wrapped in a clean, even chroma field for cutout.
render: Single clean continuous line art of even, unwavering weight — one uninterrupted contour describing face, twin-tails, pointed ear and high collar with no shading, hatching or line-thickness variation; at most one flat accent fill (a faint pale sage-green pooled in her half-lidded eyes), and the entire background left completely empty.
moment: Frieren is drawn as a calm three-quarter bust turned slightly to one side, eyes half-lidded with a faint, distant melancholy and lips relaxed. A single unbroken line of even weight travels from the crown down through her two very long silver-white twin-tails, sketches one long pointed elf ear, the soft jaw, the high stiff collar of her dark charcoal mantle and a single hairline marking the gold trim, ending at a hint of the wide belt. One slender hand, drawn in the same continuous line, rises to lightly gather a falling strand of hair near her cheek. Her half-closed eyes carry the only flat accent — a whisper of pale sage-green. The bust sits high and slightly left, leaving roughly seventy percent of the frame as clean, empty ground with no border, no panel and no slogan — the quiet of time and memory held in negative space. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and every line stay well away from the edges of the frame, surrounded by a clean, even chroma field for clipping.
art_style: Дорогой минимализм одной линии: непрерывный контур ровной толщины рисует Фрирен почти без заливок, единственный бледно-зелёный акцент — в глазах. Около 70% кадра остаётся чистой пустотой, что читается как сдержанный премиальный принт, а не портрет в рамке.
typography: No lettering on this print — leave it clean. The composition relies entirely on the single line and empty space, with no signature, caption or slogan. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: clean even blue chroma cutout ground (empty, keyed out at clip), near-black charcoal ink line, soft graphite-grey line, faint pale sage-green eye accent, muted antique-gold trim hairline
chroma_note: Единственная плоская заливка — бледно-зелёная (полуприкрытые глаза Фрирен). При зелёном хромакее этот акцент срезало бы вместе с фоном, поэтому поле для вырезки задаём синим.

name: Эмблема / бокс-лого — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, reduced here to a heraldic profile bust — head, ear and hair scrollwork only — paired with her wooden crystal staff as an iconic emblem device
framing: Compact centered emblem/badge, iconic and graphic: a single circular crest roughly one third to one half of the frame width, floating in the middle of the canvas with generous empty margins on every side. Frieren's stylised profile head and the staff-crystal symbol are locked entirely inside the roundel — small-to-medium scale, nothing bleeds past the ring. All artwork and lettering stay well clear of every edge, wrapped by a clean, even chroma field for cutout.
render: Flat vector emblem in a heraldic streetwear-crest manner: one solid ink colour plus a metallic gold accent and a cream fill, bold iconic silhouettes, crisp hard edges, high contrast and logo-like negative space — a printed badge or brand mark, not a painterly or cel-shaded illustration. No gradients beyond a single flat highlight facet on the crystal.
moment: Frieren is drawn as a heraldic device: her head in a clean left-facing profile (a hair's slant toward three-quarter), a calm, half-lidded eye and serene neutral mouth rendered as clean charcoal-ink shapes (the eye is inked flat, not filled green, so the green chroma stays clean), the long pointed elf ear rendered as one bold graphic shape. Her silver-white twin-tails sweep back and curl into symmetrical decorative scroll-forms that fill the medallion like filigree, a small hint of the golden-trimmed high collar and dark charcoal cloak framing her jaw. Her wooden staff stands vertically as the emblem's central axis directly behind the head, and its pale crystal orb sits at the very top of the ring like a keystone gem, throwing a simple flat four-point starburst. A single bold circular band frames the whole device and carries the arched wordmark; a slim vertical katakana accent runs down one inner side. This ring belongs to the emblem itself — it is a centered floating crest, NOT a decorative border along the canvas edge, and there is no full-body figure and no slogan plate. ANATOMY: only Frieren's stylised profile head, a single visible pointed elf ear and the decorative hair scrollwork are shown — no arms, no hands, no torso beyond the hinted collar, and no full-body figure; exactly one head in clean profile with one visible eye and one visible ear, correct elf features, no second or mirrored head, no duplicated face, no extra limbs, and no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and all graphic elements stay well away from the frame edges, surrounded by a clean, even chroma field for cutting out.
art_style: Геральдическая бокс-эмблема в духе стритвир-герба: голова Фрирен в профиль и символ посоха-кристалла спрессованы в компактный круглый знак — плоский вектор в одну краску плюс золотой акцент и крем. Читается как нашивка или лого бренда, а не иллюстрация: жирные силуэты, чистый негатив, круглая лента с надписью как часть самого знака.
typography: Lettering lives inside the crest, in the emblem's own palette (antique gold on charcoal). MAIN "FRIEREN" is set arched along the top inner band of the ring — an engraved-style condensed serif, all-caps, wide even letterspacing, cap-height about 0.06x the emblem diameter — the brand wordmark; appears exactly once. SECONDARY "BEYOND JOURNEY'S END" mirrors it along the bottom band, same face but roughly 0.6x the main cap-height, flanked by two small dot separators; appears exactly once. VERTICAL_JP フリーレン is a slim vertical katakana accent running down one inner side of the medallion, single colour, about the height of the profile head, subtle and non-competing; appears exactly once. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: charcoal ink #1b1b1f, antique gold #c6a04c, warm cream #f2e8d2, pale silver-grey #c9cfce, ash-blue crystal glint #a9bcc4
chroma_note: В самой эмблеме нет зелёных полей: знак построен на угле, антикварном золоте, креме и холодном серебре; кристалл дан пепельно-голубым отблеском, а глаз — плоской угольной заливкой (не зелёный). Поэтому зелёный хромакей не конфликтует с графикой и даёт чистую вырезку компактного круглого герба.

name: Дуотон / силуэт — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, wrapped in a mage's white-and-gold mantle over a dark high-collared cape, reduced to a bold moonlit semi-silhouette
framing: Frieren rendered as a bold semi-silhouette set against one very large low-hanging moon disc: the disc sits off-center filling most of the upper two-thirds, her figure turns in profile across the lower third, and the figure-plus-disc read as a single clean cuttable shape held well clear of every edge, an even flat chroma-key margin running all the way around.
render: Flat two-tone duotone poster: hard graphic shapes, a single crisp moon-lit rim splitting light from shadow, minimal internal detail, no cel-shading and no painterly gradients beyond one gentle duotone falloff across the moon disc itself.
moment: Frieren stands turned three-quarters away in the lower third, head tilted up toward the huge moon, her calm half-lidded face caught only as a thin moonlit rim along cheek, nose and the long pointed ear — most of her collapses into flat dark indigo shadow. The enormous pale moon disc dominates behind her, its lower edge kissing the top of her silhouette so figure and disc lock into one graphic form. Her very long silver-white twin side-tails read as two bold sweeping shapes lifting off her shoulders, unmistakable even as pure shape; the high-collared cape and the wide belt cut clean hard edges, and a single hair of muted antique-gold traces the mantle trim so the mage costume stays canon inside the flatness. Her wooden staff rises as a slim diagonal on one side, the pale crystal orb at its tip glowing as a small second moon-white circle echoing the great disc. Everything is silhouette-first, two tones, no rendered volume — a graphic poster of memory and quiet under the moon. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and every graphic element stay well away from the edge of the frame, surrounded by a clean even chroma-key field for cutting.
art_style: Плоский дуотон-постер в 2 доминирующих цвета: полу-силуэт Фрирен и огромный диск луны сливаются в одну графичную вырезаемую форму, драматичный контраст света и тени, никакой аниме-целло-заливки — только жёсткие силуэтные пятна и одна лунная кромка.
typography: One small vertical katakana column フリーレン set inside the lower portion of the moon disc, running top-to-bottom in the moonlight bone-white tone so it reads as a quiet graphic mark rather than a slogan; NotoSansJP-style clean sans, cap-height about 0.10x the figure width, kept well clear of the frame edge; appears exactly once. No hero phrase, no bottom slogan plate, no decorative border. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: Two dominant tones — midnight indigo shadow #1b2240 and moonlight bone-white #eef0e2; dusty slate-blue #4a5678 as the single transitional midtone / duotone falloff; muted antique gold #b9975b as one thin accent hairline on the mantle trim only; chroma-key green #00b140 for the background field
chroma_note: В кадре нет зелёных полей (только индиго-тень, бело-серебряная луна и капля антикварного золота на оторочке), поэтому берём стандартный зелёный хромакей — предохранитель «зелёный → синий» не нужен.

name: Типографика-герой — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm pale-green eyes, wearing a white-and-gold mage robe with a dark high-collared cape, rendered small and delicate as an accent within a bold typographic layout
framing: Large hero lettering dominates the composition and fills roughly 70-75% of the frame as the primary subject; Frieren appears small (about 22-28% of the frame height), integrated at the lower-left, leaning against and partly nestled into the base of the tall letterforms, seen from mid-thigh up at a gentle three-quarter angle. The whole arrangement — every letter, the small figure and all accents — sits well inside the frame with a generous even margin of clean chroma field on all four sides; nothing bleeds or touches any edge.
render: Strong expressive typographic layout as the main subject: bold display serif with tall dramatic stems and refined tapered serifs, treated as a solid duotone graphic. The small figure is a delicate flat-shaded semi-illustration with soft clean line work and only the barest flat tonal separation, staying strictly inside the two-tone world, reading as a quiet accent beside the giant lettering rather than the focus.
moment: A towering stack of display lettering reads the quiet, aching line about time and memory, arranged as three tall left-aligned lines that climb the frame like columns; the letters are the hero, filled in a warm ivory-and-charcoal duotone with faint hairline cracks suggesting ages passing, and a thin trail of tiny pressed flowers drifts diagonally across the counter of one large letter. Frieren stands small at the lower-left base of the lettering, drawn from mid-thigh up in gentle three-quarter view: her posture calm and slightly weary, one hand resting lightly against the vertical stem of the nearest giant letter as if leaning on the passage of time itself, her other hand loose at her side. Her very long silver-white hair falls in two side twin-tails, unmistakable even at this small scale; her long pointed elven ears and half-lidded pale-green eyes read clearly; she wears the white-and-cream mage robe with gold trim and the dark charcoal high-collared cape with a wide belt. Her expression is soft, distant and gently melancholic, gaze lowered toward the small scatter of flowers at her feet. The lettering and the tiny figure share one restrained duotone world so the eye lands on the words first and discovers her second, tucked into the type. No decorative border, no frame line, no bottom slogan plate — only the towering words, the small elf and a light dusting of petals. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and all graphics stay well clear of the edges of the frame, with clean even chroma field all around for cutting.
art_style: Типографика-герой: гигантская дисплейная надпись-цитата держит всю композицию как дуотон-графика, а сама Фрирен — мелкая деликатная фигурка-акцент у подножия букв. Настроение тихой меланхолии, слова важнее фигуры.

text_content.main: THE WEIGHT OF ALL THE TIME I HAVE FORGOTTEN

typography: The main quote is the hero: a bold high-contrast display serif set in three tall left-aligned lines occupying the central-upper 70% of the frame, cap-height of the largest line about 0.9x the small figure's full height, letters treated as solid ivory-charcoal duotone with faint age cracks; it appears exactly once. A single tiny vertical katakana column フリーレン runs quietly beside the lower stem of the last line at roughly 0.12x the main cap-height as a small signature accent, appears exactly once. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: warm ivory, deep charcoal-black, muted gold trim, soft silver-white hair, pale sage green (eyes and pressed leaves), dusty rose petal
chroma_note: В графике есть заметные зелёные элементы — бледно-салатовые прессованные листики среди летящих цветов и светло-зелёные глаза Фрирен (канон, убрать нельзя). На зелёном хромакее эти детали ключевались бы вместе с фоном и дали бы дыры при вырезке, поэтому ставлю синий фон — конфликтующих синих оттенков в палитре нет.

name: Сцена / пейзаж — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, wearing a cream mage robe with gold trim and a dark high-collared charcoal cape, seen small within a wide field of flowers along a road that recedes to a sunset horizon
framing: Wide horizontal establishing composition. Frieren is rendered SMALL, roughly 25% of the frame height, standing about a third in from the lower-left on a pale dirt path that winds away toward a low horizon. She occupies a tiny fraction of the scene — the vast majority of the frame is open landscape: a broad meadow of low flowers in the foreground, the receding road and rolling hills mid-ground, and a wide soft sky above. She is a full-figure but distant silhouette-scale figure, never a portrait; her face reads as a small calm dot, not a close-up. The entire scene — figure, path, flower field, hills and sky graphics — sits fully inside the frame with a generous even chroma margin of empty flat background on all four sides; nothing touches or bleeds off any edge.
render: Soft atmospheric wide establishing illustration in a painterly semi-flat storybook manner; gentle diffuse backlight from the low sun, layered aerial perspective with hills fading paler into the distance, muted washes and soft gradients, a quiet sense of great distance and long travel. Light grain, no hard cel outlines on the landscape, delicate rim-light catching the silver twin-tails.
moment: Frieren stands small and still on the winding pale path, seen from behind and slightly to the side, having paused mid-journey to gaze down the road toward the glowing horizon. Her posture is calm and unhurried, weight settled on one leg, her wooden staff with its pale crystal orb held loosely in one hand and resting its tip on the ground beside her; her free hand rests at her side. Her very long silver-white twin-tail hair drifts gently to one side in a soft breeze, catching the low sun; her cream gold-trimmed robe and dark high-collared charcoal cape are unmistakable even at this tiny scale, and her long pointed ear reads in profile against the sky. Around and far beyond her the world opens up: a wide foreground meadow of small pale wildflowers stirring in the wind, the dirt road curving gently away past low grassy hills that fade into blue-grey aerial haze, and a broad low-saturation sky washed with the warm gold and rose of a setting sun, a few thin horizontal clouds catching light. The overall mood is solitude, the passage of time and the quiet melancholy of an endless journey — the tiny mage dwarfed by an enormous tranquil landscape. There is NO decorative border, NO frame, NO banner or slogan plate — only the open scene floating in empty space. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and all graphics stay well clear of the frame edges, with clean even flat chroma background all around for easy cut-out.
art_style: Средовая кинематографичная иллюстрация-пейзаж: крошечная фигура мага теряется в огромном тихом мире, всё держится на воздушной перспективе, мягком закатном свете и настроении долгого одинокого пути. Это атмосферная сцена, а не портрет и не карточка.
typography: Optional tiny vertical katakana フリーレン set very small in the upper-right quiet sky area, at most 0.4x the height of the small figure, thin delicate sans strokes in a muted sky tone, reading as a faint atmospheric mark rather than a title; it must sit well inside the chroma margin and appears exactly once. If in doubt, leave the scene clean. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: silver-white, cream, gold trim, charcoal cape, warm sunset gold, soft rose, muted meadow green, hazy blue-grey hills
chroma_note: В кадре большое зелёное поле-луг и травянистые холмы — заметная зелень в сцене, поэтому хромакей ставим СИНИЙ, чтобы зелёная трава/листва не совпадала с фоном вырезки.

name: Полу-реализм — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm light-green eyes, wearing a cream mage robe with a dark high-collared cape
framing: Head-and-shoulders to upper-chest portrait crop in a natural three-quarter turn, the head set slightly off the vertical centre at a comfortable close portrait scale. Her hair mass, shoulders and both ear tips are held well inside the picture, with a generous empty margin on every side — nothing touches or bleeds off any edge, leaving a clean even chroma-key field all around for cut-out.
render: Soft semi-realistic painterly rendering: realistic skin with warm sub-surface midtones and faint pore texture, volumetric directional light and a gentle rim-light, individually painted silver hair strands with soft loose flyaways, believable cloth folds and weave; brush-blended gradients throughout, no flat cel-shading and no hard anime outline.
moment: Frieren is seen close, head-and-shoulders, turned three-quarters toward soft window-side light that models one cheek in a warm highlight and lets the far side of her face fall into cool shadow. Her expression is quiet and faintly wistful — light-green eyes half-lowered as if remembering someone long gone, lips softly closed. Her very long silver-white hair is gathered into two side twin-tails; near the crown the strands catch a bright rim of light and a few individual flyaway hairs drift loose, and one twin-tail slips forward over her shoulder. A long pointed elf ear is clearly visible on the lit side. She wears the cream-white mage robe, with fine antique-gold embroidery running along the high charcoal-black collar of her cape; just a sliver of the wide belt shows at the lower crop. One hand rises just into the lower frame, fingertips resting lightly against her collarbone in a calm, contemplative gesture, while the other shoulder squares gently away. There is no scenery, no props beyond her, no decorative border and no lettering — soft depth-of-field keeps all focus on her almost-breathing face and eyes. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and every strand of hair, both ear tips and the raised hand all stay well away from the edges of the frame, surrounded by a clean, even chroma-key field for easy cut-out.
art_style: Полу-реализм: живописная, почти фотографическая подача — настоящая кожа с полутонами и подповерхностным свечением, объёмный направленный свет, отдельные пряди серебряных волос и фактура ткани. Никакого плоского аниме-целла и жёсткого контура: мягкие переходы кистью, лицо «как живое».
typography: No lettering on this print — leave it clean. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: warm ivory-cream robe, cool silver-white hair, deep charcoal-black cape, soft antique-gold trim, warm peach skin midtones, muted light-green eyes
chroma_note: На субъекте нет крупных зелёных полей — мантия кремово-белая, накидка угольно-чёрная, оторочка золотая, зелёные только маленькие глаза. Поэтому безопасен стандартный зелёный хромакей: он не съест ни одной важной области портрета.

name: Поп-арт / комикс — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, in a cream mage robe with gold trim and a dark high-collared cape
framing: Comic-panel bust — her head, both long silver twin-tails, shoulders and the upper chest of the mage robe — turned three-quarters and set slightly left of centre, drawn as one flat comic panel. A bold hand-lettered speech bubble floats at the upper right and a small angled narration box is tucked into the top-left corner. The crop is tight and punchy but nothing touches the frame: subject, bubble and box are all held well inside, ringed on every side by a clean, even chroma margin for cutout.
render: Roy Lichtenstein pop-art comic: heavy uniform black outlines around every shape, bold regular Ben-Day halftone dots for cheeks and shading, flat bright primary-colour fills with no gradients, and a printed-comic feel with a faint hint of off-register colour on the edges.
moment: Frieren gazes slightly off-panel with a quietly wistful, faraway look — half-lidded light-green eyes, brows softly lifted, lips just parted as if a long-buried memory has surfaced. One gloved hand is raised near her collarbone, fingertips resting against the high collar of her charcoal cape. Her silver-white twin-tails sweep bold and outlined, filled flat silver-grey with a strip of Ben-Day dots for sheen, and the pointed elf ear on the near side reads sharp and clear. The cream robe with gold trim and the dark high-collared cape are rendered as flat colour plates carved apart by thick black seams. Behind her sits a single flat bright-yellow field carrying an even grid of red Ben-Day dots — no scene, no landscape, and no decorative border of any kind. A bold black-outlined white speech bubble at the upper right holds her short line, its tail pointing toward her; a small yellow narration box angles into the top-left corner. The drama is carried entirely by the graphic idiom — heavy outlines, dot fields, a low dramatic angle — not by any exaggerated grimace, so her serene, ageless elven melancholy stays fully intact and recognisable. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject, the speech bubble, the narration box and every graphic element stay well clear of the frame edge, surrounded on all sides by a clean, even, flat chroma field for clean cutout.
art_style: Ретро-комикс в духе Роя Лихтенштейна: жирный чёрный контур, бен-дэй точки вместо теней, плоские яркие плашки-примитивы и рукописный речевой пузырь. Драма создаётся графикой и низким ракурсом, а спокойная эльфийская меланхолия Фрирен остаётся узнаваемой.
typography: Three separate lettering elements, each appearing exactly once. (1) Speech bubble, upper right: hand-lettered comic caps in a slightly irregular ink-brush comic face, cap-height about 0.10x the figure width, inside a bold black-outlined white bubble with a tail toward Frieren — this is the emotional beat. (2) Narration box, top-left corner: small bold condensed comic caps on a flat yellow rectangle with a thin black keyline, cap-height about 0.06x figure width, reading FIFTY YEARS LATER — a comic time-skip caption, not a bottom slogan. (3) A tiny vertical フリーレン in katakana near the lower cape edge, cap-height about 0.04x figure width, a quiet signature. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: Cadmium yellow background, vermilion red dots and lip accent, cyan blue cape-shadow and dot accents, silver-grey white hair, warm gold ochre robe trim, ink black outlines
chroma_note: Крупных зелёных полей в кадре нет: фон — плоская ярко-жёлтая плашка с красными бен-дэй точками, волосы серебристо-белые, мантия кремовая, накидка угольно-чёрная. Зелёный присутствует только в маленьких глазах Фрирен, на вырезку по зелёному хромакею это не влияет, поэтому chroma green безопасен.

name: Гранж / стрит-трафарет — Фрирен
subject: Frieren, a slender young-looking female elf with very long silver-white twin-tail hair, long pointed ears and calm green eyes, wearing a mage's white-and-gold trimmed mantle with a high-collared charcoal cloak
framing: Off-center spray-stencil bust of Frieren cut at mid-chest, tilted slightly and pushed to the upper-left of the field so torn paper, drips and sticker scraps can spill across the rest of the composition; the whole ragged collage sits well inside the frame with a generous even chroma margin on all four sides, no element bleeding to the edge.
render: Hand-cut multi-layer spray-stencil look: flat blocked shapes in 3-4 ink layers, hard bridge-gaps in the stencil, aerosol overspray haze and dotty spatter, xerox-photocopy grain and blown-out contrast, torn newsprint paper edges, dried paint drips and hand-scrawled marker — deliberately rough punk DIY street-poster texture, not clean anime cel.
moment: Frieren rendered as a rough two-tone spray-stencil bust, seen from a low three-quarter angle, her half-lidded pale-green eyes and faint melancholic half-frown reading clearly through the blocky stencil bridges. Her very long silver-white hair breaks into two side twin-tails that dissolve into aerosol overspray and hard spatter dots at the tips; her long pointed elf ears cut sharp negative-space notches against a torn-paper backing. The high charcoal collar and the gold-trimmed white mantle are suggested by two or three flat stencil layers with visible mis-registration. The bust is pushed to the upper-left; the rest of the field is a punk collage — a torn strip of photocopied newsprint behind her, three or four dried paint drips running downward, a couple of half-peeled sticker scraps and a hand-scrawled marker tag, plus a stenciled hourglass motif half-sprayed near her shoulder to echo the theme of time and memory. No decorative border, no centered full-length figure, no slogan banner. ANATOMY: exactly two arms and two hands, correct anatomy, no extra or duplicated limbs, no second figure or alternate pose. The subject and all graphics stay well away from the frame edge, surrounded by a clean, even chroma field for cutout.
art_style: Уличный трафарет-постер в панк-эстетике: спрей-трафаретный бюст Фрирен из 3-4 плоских слоёв краски с потёками, оверспреем и ксерокс-зерном, поверх рваной газетной бумаги и обрывков наклеек. Нарочито грубо, антидекор — «расклеено на стене», а не аккуратный портрет.
typography: Only a small stencil-sprayed vertical katakana tag フリーレン, placed low near the paint drips as if hand-stenciled graffiti, cap-height about 0.10x the figure width, rough overspray edges, reading as a street tag rather than a title — appears exactly once. No other text beyond what is specified.
palette: off-white newsprint, charcoal black ink, muted silver-grey, dull gold ochre, faded sea-green spray, brick-red sticker accent
chroma_note: Фрирен имеет канонические светло-зелёные глаза, а в палитре есть faded sea-green спрей на волосах/оверспрее — то есть зелёные элементы находятся на самом субъекте. Чтобы зелёный хромакей не выел зелёный спрей и глаза, поле выбрано СИНИМ. Синего в палитре нет (off-white/charcoal/silver-grey/gold-ochre/sea-green/brick-red), конфликтов с фоном не возникает — чистый вырез гарантирован.
